ab: tuahlʉ aku i umuhli vahlituku u?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: acahli, tumua u atainini vahlituku?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: asapucu aku ahlava vahlituku, tuahlʉ aku i umuhli vahlituku u?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: kuaku mʉmʉa ahlava vahlituku.
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: asapucu aku ahlava vahlituku, tuahlʉ aku i umuhli vahlituku u?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring the money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: kutuahlʉ, kuna u apuaili hliuhliu vahlituku nai.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: tuahlʉ aku i umuhli tikuru u?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: a’ʉ, takacicihli umala.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: tuahlʉ aku i umuhli suhlati u?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: pauhliacua ihlaku Apʉ na.
en: B:I lent it to Apʉ.

ab: pauhli kiia ihlaku likihli u umaruasapahlʉ?
ch: A:請借我妳的腳踏車好嗎?

ab: a’ʉ, ucaniika tumua apuaili ihlaku matata.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: umusahlicu, kuaku ahlava saunga, pauhliu saunga a’ʉ i ia?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me one?

ab: ucani sangalʉ saunga ku. kikucu a ita ma saunga.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: kani’i suhlatʉ na hliuhliu ihlaku kikiari, apuaili ihlau.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: maci tumua mana kumakita suhlatʉ usumanʉ ia kiahlahlamu ihlaku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: cuhlaumangiku apuaili ihlau vahlituku?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: hlimini, macuu marucu vahlituku ia kiahlahlamu kiia.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It’s okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: cuhlaumangiku apuaili ihlaku vahlituku?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: apuaili ku ihlau matata.
en: A: I will return it to you tomorrow.

ab: cuhlaumangiu apuaili ku suhlatʉ?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ku i hliapuailicu ku kiira?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: kani’i siasuhlatʉ na hlipauhliisa i Caʉpʉ na ihlau?
en: A: Did Caʉpʉ lend you this pen?

ab: a’ʉ, hliuhliku isana arinani.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: kani’i siasuhlatʉ na hliuhli i Caʉpʉ na?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Caʉpʉ?

ab: ku, kani’ina ia hlipu’aisa ina’ana.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: uka’a cua maihli, cuu umuhli Vanau na maini maihli.
en: A: We’re out of salt, let’s go borrow some from Vanau.

ab: a’ʉ, muasa ku umuhli.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: cuu pakuvaua Vanau na apuaili ihlaku vahlituku.
en: B: Go tell Vanau to give me back my money.

ab: tainini a hliuhliisa kana’ana ihlau?
en: A:How much does she owe you? (How much money did she borrow from you?)
